result_slots.verification: compare the run card with the frozen manifest and accepted matrix

result_slots.source_field: probability_fully_dismissed, outcome, and brier for each public unit row
result_slots.verification: recompute each loss as (probability_fully_dismissed - outcome)^2, reject any brier mismatch, then average the recomputed losses by analysis cell

result_slots.source_field: paired intervals, win probabilities, rank tiers, and cluster warning
result_slots.verification: reconstruct from public unit rows using the frozen coarsest-cluster rule

result_slots.absence_display: Not available - no paired full_packet and metadata_only rows in audited aggregate
result_slots.source_field: full_packet minus metadata_only paired micro-Brier results
result_slots.verification: when the artifact is indexed, join exact model and unit identities and reproduce the paired contrast; otherwise verify that the aggregate contains no paired full_packet and metadata_only rows
recompute from public probabilities and outcomes without changing frozen bins

result_slots.source_field: coverage, refusal, invalid-output, and required-unit-default rates
result_slots.verification: compare denominators with the expected prediction-unit matrix
recompute from the public scored-unit outcome field

result_slots.source_field: baseline corpus, model, training-period, and no-baseline disclosures
result_slots.verification: verify baseline rows and any skill language against the frozen baseline status

result_slots.source_field: run_count, request_count, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, mean_latency_ms, p95_latency_ms, total_estimated_cost, cost_per_case, and cost_per_prediction_unit
result_slots.verification: recompute totals and derived rates from accepted public accounting fields, preserve missing dimensions, and verify the disclosed auth and pricing basis

result_slots.source_field: release and public artifact SHA-256 values
result_slots.verification: hash every indexed artifact and bind the manuscript to the audited release
